about.title: About RastaBike
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.mission: Born from a love of the beach, the breeze, and the freedom of the open road. RastaBike brings you premium electric bikes with a soul — combining Israeli beach culture with eco-friendly transportation.
about.why1Desc: Zero emissions, pure freedom. Our electric bikes help you move sustainably.
about.why2Desc: Every bike is carefully selected for durability, performance, and style.
about.why3Desc: Designed for the coastal life — sand, sun, and smooth rides.
about.why4Desc: We're riders too. Get advice from people who know and love e-bikes.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch — we'd love to hear from you
contact.formSuccess: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
